confirmation.title: Order Confirmed!
confirmation.message: Your order has been received. We have sent the details to your email. If we need additional information, we will contact you shortly.

wordpress.title: Next Steps for Your WordPress Site
wordpress.intro: To start your project, we need access to your WordPress site.
wordpress.step1: Create an admin user in your WordPress panel with the email: contact@crixiumdigital.com.
wordpress.step3: Send us the site information and password through your order tracking or by email to contact@crixiumdigital.com.
wordpress.noWordPress: If you don't have a WordPress site yet, don't worry. Send us a message through your order tracking and we'll help you set it up.

shopify.title: Next Steps for Your Shopify Store
shopify.intro: To start your project, we need access to your Shopify store. You can choose either of these options.
shopify.option1_title: Option 1: Send us your store code
shopify.option1_step1: Go to your Shopify panel → Settings → Users and permissions → Add collaborator.
shopify.option1_step2: Copy your store code (e.g. store123.myshopify.com or 1234).
shopify.option1_step3: Send this code through your order tracking or by email to contact@crixiumdigital.com.
shopify.option1_step4: We'll send you an official request that you just need to accept.
shopify.option2_title: Option 2: Add us directly as a collaborator
shopify.option2_step1: Go to Settings → Users and permissions.
shopify.option2_step2: Add contact@crixiumdigital.com as staff with full access.
shopify.noShopify: If you don't have a Shopify store yet, send us a message and we'll help you set it up.

validation.requiredProductCount: Approximate number of products is required.
